title: Anti Copykiller
description: Upload a .docx file to automatically reduce plagiarism and AI-generated content rates to your target.

openGraph.title: Anti Copykiller — Auto-reduce Plagiarism & AI Rate
openGraph.description: Upload a .docx file, then Copykiller checks it, AI rewrites suspicious sentences, and re-checks until your target rates are met.

login.title: Login Required
login.description: Please log in first. Contact: okdohyuk@gmail.com

sponsor.title: Access Required
sponsor.description: Anti Copykiller is available to authorized users only. Contact: okdohyuk@gmail.com

form.title: Start New Job
form.filePlaceholder: Drag and drop or click to select a file
form.targetPlagHelper: Reduce plagiarism rate below this value.
form.targetAiHelper: Reduce AI-generated rate below this value.
form.maxIterationsHelper: Maximum number of retry attempts if the target is not met.
form.conflictError: A job is already in progress. Please wait until it completes.
form.apiError: Failed to create job. Please try again later.
